biography: Jonas, representing Vantaan Golfpuisto, marked his presence in the Hector Trophée across two distinct editions. His participation offered a glimpse into his competitive faculties within the challenging and unique framework of this esteemed pairs competition.

During his two engagements with the tournament's rigorous multi-day format, which encompasses both individual contests and strategic pair play, Jonas applied himself with earnest commitment. Despite his diligent efforts across these outings, neither the esteemed Hector Trophée for the victorious pair nor the prestigious Victor Trophy for the leading individual performer came to fruition, highlighting the exacting competitive standard of the event.

With his involvement now concluded, Jonas is considered to have retired from active competition in Hector events. Consequently, he will not be among the distinguished field for the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026, bringing a quiet close to his chapter in this unique tournament's history.
